product_overview: AgendiX is a SaaS platform for barbershops and beauty salons to manage appointments, clients, finances, staff, and public bookings in one mobile-first system. It helps owners and professionals run daily operations while giving clients fast self-service booking and queue access.
core_goals: Let owners log in and access the business dashboard
Help owners schedule and manage appointments from a calendar view
Allow clients to book appointments publicly without authentication
Enable owners to manage walk-in queues in real time
Provide a client list and individual CRM history view
Show financial summaries and transaction history
Let owners configure the service catalog and business settings

features.name: Login Gateway
features.description: Lets users choose the barber or beauty experience before entering the login form.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/login -> View the gateway screen -> Select the barber experience -> See the email and password login form
Navigate to /#/login -> View the gateway screen -> Select the beauty experience -> See the email and password login form

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticates users with email and password through Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/login -> Select the barber experience or beauty experience -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard or onboarding flow
Navigate to /#/login -> Select the barber experience or beauty experience -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form with invalid credentials -> See an error message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows the main home screen with business metrics and quick navigation to other sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/ -> View daily metrics and summaries -> Open the agenda or another section from the sidebar

features.name: Agenda
features.description: Provides a calendar for viewing, creating, and updating appointments.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/agenda -> View the calendar by day or week -> Open an appointment slot -> See appointment details
Navigate to /#/agenda -> View the calendar -> Create a new appointment -> Review the appointment information -> Confirm the appointment
Navigate to /#/agenda -> Open an appointment -> Change the appointment status

features.name: Public Booking
features.description: Allows clients to book appointments from a public link without signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/book/:slug -> View the business booking page -> Select a service -> Choose a professional and a time slot -> Fill in name and phone -> Confirm the booking -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /#/book/:slug -> View the business booking page -> Select a service -> Choose a time slot -> Fill in name and phone -> Confirm the booking -> See the pending reservation status

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Lets authenticated users search clients and open detailed CRM records.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/clientes -> Search clients by name or phone -> Open a client record -> See appointment history and notes
Navigate to /#/clientes -> Browse the client list -> Open a client record -> Review the CRM details

features.name: Finance
features.description: Shows revenue summaries and transaction history for the business.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/financeiro -> View revenue, expense, and profit summaries -> Filter transactions by period
Navigate to /#/financeiro -> View financial transactions -> Open the payment checkout modal

features.name: Queue Management
features.description: Lets owners monitor and advance the live client queue.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/fila -> View clients in the queue -> Move a client to the next status
Navigate to /#/fila -> View clients in the queue -> Remove a client from the queue

features.name: Settings Services
features.description: Lets owners manage the services offered by the business.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/configuracoes/servicos -> View the service list -> Add a service -> Edit service name, price, or duration -> Toggle the service active status
Navigate to /#/configuracoes/servicos -> View the service list -> Edit a service -> Toggle the service active status

routes.description: Login page with barber/beauty gateway and email/password form
Staff registration via company owner link
Set new password after recovery link
Business reports and insights for owners
Initial setup wizard for new owners

features.name: Login Gateway
features.description: User selects barber or beauty segment before login form
user_interactions: View AgendiX logo and gateway screen
Click Barber segment card to open login form
Click Beauty segment card to open login form

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password via Supabase
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to dashboard or onboarding on success

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main home screen with business metrics and quick actions
user_interactions: Navigate to agenda or other sections via sidebar

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase queries for appointments and metrics

features.name: Agenda
features.description: Calendar view for scheduling and managing appointments
user_interactions: Click appointment slot to view details

features.name: Client Management
user_interactions: Search clients by name or phone

features.name: Finance
features.description: Financial dashboard with income and expenses

features.name: Settings Services
features.description: Configure services offered by the business
user_interactions: Add or edit service name price and duration

known_limitations.issue: HashRouter requires hash prefix in URLs (/#/route not /route)
known_limitations.impact: Direct navigation must use hash paths for TestSprite browser automation

known_limitations.issue: Login shows gateway screen before email/password form
known_limitations.impact: Tests must select barber or beauty segment before filling credentials

known_limitations.issue: Authenticated routes redirect to onboarding if tutorial not completed
known_limitations.impact: Test user must have completed onboarding or tests hit wizard instead of dashboard

known_limitations.issue: Owner-only routes redirect staff users to home with toast
known_limitations.impact: Finance/marketing/settings tests need owner role credentials
